✨ War Magic — Battle Spells▼

Unlocked spells appear beside the battlefield. Tap one mid-battle, then tap the field to unleash it. Each has its own cooldown.

Field Equipment — Trap Zone

Traps and hazards placed in the mid-battlefield zone. They trigger automatically when an enemy steps close, then reset after each battle.

Spend Iron Fragments to permanently empower your forces. Each costs 1 fragment.

Hall of Heroes

Champions of legend. Each may be recruited once, fights alongside your army, and trains far beyond common soldiers — to level 10.

Complete these challenges to earn gold rewards. Claimed rewards are marked in gold.

⚔

Victory

✦ ✦ ✦
💚 Tip: Healers keep your warriors alive longer — unlock one in the Armory → Barracks!
⚔️ Mid-Battle Reinforcements Unlocked!
During a fight tap the ‹ › arrow on the left edge of the battlefield to call in fresh troops for gold.
🪤 Unlock Traps & Barricades!
Open Armory → Equipment to unlock permanent traps that trigger automatically each battle.
✨ War Magic Unlocked!
Go to Armory → War Magic — Frost Nova is FREE to claim!
⚒ The Forge Awaits!
Visit Armory → Forge — your first weapon upgrade is FREE!
🗼 Watch Tower Available!
Open Armory → Equipment — your first Watch Tower is FREE. Towers persist between battles but must be repurchased if destroyed.
✨ Spin Fortune's Wheel! Available every 5 waves for bonus rewards.
BATTLE CHRONICLE

Fortune's Wheel

Every 5 waves — one spin
▼

Enemy Forces

IRONVALE

The valley is under siege. Recruit an army, forge better steel, and place your warriors wisely — tanks to the front, archers behind, healers safe in the rear.

Tap a unit below the field, then tap your half of the battlefield to deploy. Every 5th level a boss awaits — 100 levels in all. Barricades and spike traps (max 8) hold your line.
